assessment.summary_for_seller: Good run: you held context, answered on-point, and brought the conversation to a next step.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message anchors to a specific signal from the card.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mark, Docklane has 15+ engineers in AM/GE/KZ and payment delays have already cost you time twice. Mellow takes the manual escalations off your plate: auto-payments, statuses without chat threads, a named owner when things break. Plus I can give you material for finance if you need to move it internally. What takes the most time in payment coordination right now?
criteria.label: Contextual opening

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility
criteria.short_reason: Seller stated Mellow's control scope without overclaiming.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow's scope specifically: KYC, contractor documentation, payment chain, and audit trail on every transaction — on our side. What we don't take on: misclassification risk and strategic legal decisions — those stay with you. That's the line, without blurring it.
criteria.label: Scope & responsibility boundary

criteria.name: Language fit
criteria.short_reason: Language is adapted to the chosen persona.

criteria.name: Handling core objections
criteria.short_reason: At least two key objections addressed substantively.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mark, Docklane has 15+ engineers in AM/GE/KZ and payment delays have already cost you time twice. Mellow takes the manual escalations off your plate: auto-payments, statuses without chat threads, a named owner when things break. objections.objection: Tired of being the middleman between finance and contractors. If this really removes manual escalations — what specifically gets removed and how much?
I've tried similar vendors before. One promised the same and delivered nothing.
Ok. Send me something I can bring to finance without a long internal pitch.

criteria.label: Core objection handling

transcript.text: Mark, Docklane has 15+ engineers in AM/GE/KZ and payment delays have already cost you time twice. Plus I can give you material for finance if you need to move it internally. What takes the most time in payment coordination right now?
Tired of being the middleman between finance and contractors. If this really removes manual escalations — what specifically gets removed and how much?
From your current setup, what is creating the most manual work right now?
I've tried similar vendors before. One promised the same and delivered nothing.
undefined What would take the most pain off your team specifically?
Ok. Send me something I can bring to finance without a long internal pitch.
